title: eriogonum minus
intro: Eriogonum minus, also known as desert trumpet or red-stemmed buckwheat, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds, burns, and skin conditions due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Eriogonum minus include its ability to soothe and protect the skin, reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as its potential to act as an antiseptic to prevent infection. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, salves, and tinctures, which are often used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
